spec.name: Outside A Small Cabin In The Forest
spec.description: You are outside a small cabin built entirely from heavy logs. There is a wooden door to the north and small paths lead west and south through the trees.

north.description: The wooden door is quite sturdy but does not appear to be equipped with a lock.

south.description: The small path leads south through the dense forest.

west.description: The small path leads west through the light forest.

extra_descs.description: It looks simple but comfortable and the slender trees make the whole place seem pretty idyllic. It is a cabin built from wooden logs.
The path is probably used by the cabin's inhabitants.
The trees are fairly young, not much more than a hundred years or so.
